scripts.build: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=1536' next build
scripts.perf:seed: test -f scripts/perf-seed.ts && tsx scripts/perf-seed.ts || echo 'perf:seed is a local-only benchmark tool (gitignored); not present in this checkout.'
scripts.perf:clean: test -f scripts/perf-clean.ts && tsx scripts/perf-clean.ts || echo 'perf:clean is a local-only benchmark tool (gitignored); not present in this checkout.'
scripts.perf:measure: test -f vitest.perf.config.ts && vitest run --config vitest.perf.config.ts || echo 'perf:measure is a local-only benchmark tool (gitignored); not present in this checkout.'
scripts.test:all: vitest run && vitest run --config vitest.integration.config.ts && npm run test:legacy
scripts.setup: prisma generate && prisma migrate deploy && tsx prisma/seed.ts
